purpose: Track generated/python runtime and operation-executor Python files whose location alone could be mistaken for generated ownership.
completion_rule: The Python CLI completion gate may reach full-generated-cli-complete only when every generated projection entry is rendered-by-command-generation, blocking_full_completion is false for every entry, command-generation render_outputs produces the same paths, generated command modules do not import package-owned runtime helpers directly, and any remaining package-domain runtime source or generated runtime facade bridge is proven by exact source-symbol boundary entries. Whole-file runtime source or whole-facade acceptance is not sufficient for final completion.

accepted_runtime_boundaries.completion_rule: Accepted runtime boundaries support full Python generated CLI completion only when every package-domain source call is listed as an exact source module and symbol, each generated facade wrapper is checked against that allowlist, and every entry declares callers, boundary class, conformance, final or migration status, and generic-behavior audit.

entries.source_of_truth: src/agentic_workspace/contracts/command_package_ir.json python_runtime_binding.render_runtime_module plus workspace operation IR resources and explicit runtime primitive handler bindings
entries.why_blocking: not blocking; this runtime handler map is mechanically rendered from command-package binding metadata while product-specific live workspace behavior is behind explicit runtime primitive bindings
entries.required_resolution: Keep generated freshness proof covering this file and continue migrating generic deterministic behavior from workspace runtime primitives into codegen-owned primitives.
